case_title: RELIANT CORPORATION vs. MUTTARDI, HUSSEIN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELIANT CORPORATION SERVED DEC-28-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MUTTARDI, HUSSEIN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RELIANT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUTTARDI, HUSSEIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 01/25/95 $2,309.49 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,389.49, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MUTTARDI, HUSSEIN
DECLARATION OF ROGER KWAN FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELIANT CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RELIANT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUTTARDI, HUSSEIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1430 PACIFIC AVE. S.F.
